description_cn: 如Sechelmann,Rorig&Bobenko在论文“准等温线网格布局”中所述，制作四网格S-等温线。
description_en: Make a quad mesh S-Isothermic, as described in the paper 'Quasiisothermic Mesh Layout' by Sechelmann, Rörig & Bobenko。

parameters.name: M
parameters.desc_cn: 要生成等温线的四边网格
parameters.desc_en: A quad mesh to make isothermic

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
